title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at The Coffee Bean India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at The Coffee Bean India
jsonLd.description:
The Coffee Bean India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About The Coffee Bean India:
The Coffee Bean India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Coffee Bean India!
